title: DO NOT MERGE: Vendor in mtrmac/image:dockerd-verification
body: This updates skopeo to build after https://github.com/containers/image/pull/288 .

comments.body: Anything going on with this PR?  Needs update.

> Anything going on with this PR? Needs update.

Not too recently; I’ll update it in a batch with the others.
This PR is over two years old and has not been updated in a long time.   I am going to close this, reopen if you want to update it.
I guess we don’t care about adding run-time signature verification to `docker run` any more, so I’ll close the related c/image and Jira issues as well.
